name: Talladega Egg Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together.
2. Add remaining ingredients and beat well.
3. Pour mixture into a greased pan.
4. Bake in a hot oven until brown.
5. Serve 6-8 people. (Note: A smaller recipe is often used, and the bread can also be cooked on top of the stove using a cast-iron skillet preheated to around 500°F. The batter should sizzle when poured in. Cooking time is about 15-20 minutes, so watch closely to avoid a grease fire.)
